>=0.8.0 <0.9.0;\n\nimport { ERC1155 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC1155/ERC1155.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/AccessControl.sol\";\n\ncontract CoffeeTracker is ERC1155, AccessControl {\n    bytes32 public constant FARMER_ROLE = keccak256(\"FARMER_ROLE\");\n    bytes32 public constant PROCESSOR_ROLE = keccak256(\"PROCESSOR_ROLE\");\n    bytes32 public constant ROASTER_ROLE = keccak256(\"ROASTER_ROLE\");\n    bytes32 public constant DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE = keccak256(\"DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE\");\n\n    uint256 private _batchIdCounter = 1;\n    uint256 private _transactionCount;\n    uint256 private _farmCount;\n\n    enum Region {\n        Kona,\n        Kau,\n        Puna,\n        Hamakua,\n        Maui,\n        Kauai,\n        Molokai,\n        Oahu,\n        Other\n    }\n\n    enum Variety {\n        Typica,\n        Geisha,\n        Caturra,\n        Catuai,\n        MauiMokka,\n        Bourbon,\n        Peaberry,\n        Maragogype,\n        MundoNovo,\n        Other\n    }\n\n    enum ProcessingMethod {\n        Natural,\n        Washed,\n        Honey,\n        Anaerobic,\n        Other\n    }\n\n    enum RoastingMethod {\n        Drum,\n        HotAir,\n        FluidBed,\n        Infrared,\n        Other\n    }\n\n    enum RoastLevel {\n        Light,\n        Medium,\n        Dark\n    }\n\n    struct CoffeeBatch {\n        uint64 batchId;\n        uint32 mintTimestamp;\n        bool verified;\n        Region region;\n        Variety variety;\n        ProcessingMethod processingMethod;\n        RoastingMethod roastingMethod;\n        RoastLevel roastLevel;\n        address farmer;\n        address processor;\n        address roaster;\n        address distributor;\n        string batchName;\n        string metadataCID;\n    }\n\n    mapping(uint256 => CoffeeBatch) private batches;\n    mapping(string => uint256) public batchNameToId;\n    mapping(address => uint256[]) private userBatches;\n    mapping(address => bool) private registeredFarms;\n\n    event Harvested(\n        uint256 indexed batchId,\n        string batchName,\n        string metadataCID,\n        address indexed farmer,\n        Region indexed region,\n        Variety variety\n    );\n\n    event Processed(\n        uint256 indexed batchId,\n        string batchName,\n        string metadataCID,\n        address indexed processor,\n        ProcessingMethod processingMethod\n    );\n\n    event Roasted(\n        uint256 indexed batchId,\n        string batchName,\n        string metadataCID,\n        address indexed roaster,\n        RoastingMethod roastingMethod,\n        RoastLevel roastLevel\n    );\n\n    event Distributed(uint256 indexed batchId, string batchName, string metadataCID, address indexed distributor);\n\n    event Verified(uint256 indexed batchId, string batchName, string metadataCID, address indexed verifier);\n\n    event MetadataUpdated(uint256 indexed batchId, string batchName, string metadataCID);\n\n    constructor() ERC1155(\"\") {\n        _grantRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender);\n        _grantRole(FARMER_ROLE, msg.sender);\n        _grantRole(PROCESSOR_ROLE, msg.sender);\n        _grantRole(ROASTER_ROLE, msg.sender);\n        _grantRole(DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    modifier onlyRoleOrAdmin(bytes32 role) {\n        require(\n            hasRole(role, msg.sender) || hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender),\n            \"AccessControl: unauthorized account\"\n        );\n        _;\n    }\n\n    function harvestBatch(\n        string calldata _batchName,\n        Region _region,\n        Variety _variety,\n        string calldata _metadataCID\n    ) public onlyRoleOrAdmin(FARMER_ROLE) {\n        require(batchNameToId[_batchName] == 0, \"This coffee batch name already exists!\");\n\n        uint256 _batchId = _batchIdCounter;\n\n        batches[_batchId] = CoffeeBatch({\n            batchId: uint64(_batchId),\n            mintTimestamp: uint32(block.timestamp),\n            verified: false,\n            region: _region,\n            variety: _variety,\n            processingMethod: ProcessingMethod.Other,\n            roastingMethod: RoastingMethod.Other,\n            roastLevel: RoastLevel.Medium,\n            farmer: msg.sender,\n            processor: address(0),\n            roaster: address(0),\n            distributor: address(0),\n            batchName: _batchName,\n            metadataCID: _metadataCID\n        });\n\n        batchNameToId[_batchName] = _batchId;\n        userBatches[msg.sender].push(_batchId);\n\n        if (!registeredFarms[msg.sender]) {\n            registeredFarms[msg.sender] = true;\n            _farmCount++;\n        }\n\n        emit Harvested(_batchId, _batchName, _metadataCID, msg.sender, _region, _variety);\n\n        _batchIdCounter++;\n        _transactionCount++;\n\n        _mint(msg.sender, _batchId, 1, \"\");\n    }\n\n    function processBatch(\n        uint256 _batchId,\n        ProcessingMethod _processingMethod,\n        string calldata _metadataCID\n    ) public onlyRoleOrAdmin(PROCESSOR_ROLE) {\n        CoffeeBatch storage batch = batches[_batchId];\n\n        require(batch.farmer != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be harvested!\");\n        require(\n            batch.processor == address(0) || batch.processor == msg.sender || hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender),\n            \"This coffee batch has already been processed!\"\n        );\n\n        if (batch.processor == address(0)) {\n            userBatches[msg.sender].push(_batchId);\n        }\n\n        batch.processor = msg.sender;\n        batch.processingMethod = _processingMethod;\n        batch.metadataCID = _metadataCID;\n\n        emit Processed(_batchId, batch.batchName, _metadataCID, msg.sender, _processingMethod);\n\n        _transactionCount++;\n    }\n\n    function roastBatch(\n        uint256 _batchId,\n        RoastingMethod _roastingMethod,\n        RoastLevel _roastLevel,\n        string calldata _metadataCID\n    ) public onlyRoleOrAdmin(ROASTER_ROLE) {\n        CoffeeBatch storage batch = batches[_batchId];\n\n        require(batch.farmer != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be harvested!\");\n        require(batch.processor != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be processed!\");\n        require(\n            batch.roaster == address(0) || batch.roaster == msg.sender || hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender),\n            \"This coffee batch has already been roasted!\"\n        );\n\n        if (batch.roaster == address(0)) {\n            userBatches[msg.sender].push(_batchId);\n        }\n\n        batch.roaster = msg.sender;\n        batch.roastingMethod = _roastingMethod;\n        batch.roastLevel = _roastLevel;\n        batch.metadataCID = _metadataCID;\n\n        emit Roasted(_batchId, batch.batchName, _metadataCID, msg.sender, _roastingMethod, _roastLevel);\n\n        _transactionCount++;\n    }\n\n    function distributeBatch(uint256 _batchId, string calldata _metadataCID) public onlyRoleOrAdmin(DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE) {\n        CoffeeBatch storage batch = batches[_batchId];\n\n        require(batch.farmer != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be harvested!\");\n        require(batch.processor != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be processed!\");\n        require(batch.roaster != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be roasted!\");\n        require(\n            batch.distributor == address(0) ||\n                batch.distributor == msg.sender ||\n                hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, msg.sender),\n            \"This coffee batch has already been distributed!\"\n        );\n\n        if (batch.distributor == address(0)) {\n            userBatches[msg.sender].push(_batchId);\n        }\n\n        batch.distributor = msg.sender;\n        batch.metadataCID = _metadataCID;\n\n        emit Distributed(_batchId, batch.batchName, _metadataCID, msg.sender);\n\n        _transactionCount++;\n    }\n\n    function verifyBatch(uint256 _batchId) public onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) {\n        CoffeeBatch storage batch = batches[_batchId];\n\n        require(batch.farmer != address(0), \"This coffee batch must be harvested!\");\n        require(!batch.verified, \"This coffee batch has already been verified!\");\n\n        batch.verified = true;\n\n        emit Verified(_batchId, batch.batchName, batch.metadataCID, msg.sender);\n\n        _transactionCount++;\n    }\n\n    function updateMetadataCID(uint256 _batchId, string calldata _metadataCID) public onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) {\n        CoffeeBatch storage batch = batches[_batchId];\n        require(batch.farmer != address(0), \"Batch does not exist!\");\n\n        batch.metadataCID = _metadataCID;\n        emit MetadataUpdated(_batchId, batch.batchName, _metadataCID);\n    }\n\n    function getBatch(uint256 _batchId) public view returns (CoffeeBatch memory) {\n        require(_batchId >= 1 && _batchId < _batchIdCounter, \"This coffee batch does not exist!\");\n\n        return batches[_batchId];\n    }\n\n    function getBatchByName(string memory _batchName) public view returns (CoffeeBatch memory) {\n        uint256 _batchId = batchNameToId[_batchName];\n        require(_batchId != 0, \"Batch not found\");\n        return batches[_batchId];\n    }\n\n    function getBatches(uint256 offset, uint256 limit) public view returns (CoffeeBatch[] memory) {\n        require(limit <= 100, \"Limit too high\");\n\n        uint256 total = _batchIdCounter - 1;\n        if (offset >= total) return new CoffeeBatch[](0);\n\n        uint256 end = offset + limit;\n        if (end > total) end = total;\n\n        CoffeeBatch[] memory result = new CoffeeBatch[](end - offset);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < end - offset; i++) {\n            result[i] = batches[offset + i + 1];\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    function getUserBatches(address user) public view returns (CoffeeBatch[] memory history) {\n        uint256[] memory ids = userBatches[user];\n        history = new CoffeeBatch[](ids.length);\n\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {\n            history[i] = batches[ids[i]];\n        }\n\n        return history;\n    }\n\n    function getBatchCount() public view returns (uint256) {\n        return _batchIdCounter - 1;\n    }\n\n    function getTransactionCount() public view returns (uint256) {\n        return _transactionCount;\n    }\n\n    function getFarmCount() public view returns (uint256) {\n        return _farmCount;\n    }\n\n    function getRoles(address account) public view returns (string[] memory) {\n        uint256 count = 0;\n        \n        if (hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, account)) count++;\n        if (hasRole(FARMER_ROLE, account)) count++;\n        if (hasRole(PROCESSOR_ROLE, account)) count++;\n        if (hasRole(ROASTER_ROLE, account)) count++;\n        if (hasRole(DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE, account)) count++;\n\n        if (count == 0) {\n            string[] memory none = new string[](1);\n            none[0] = \"User\";\n            return none;\n        }\n\n        string[] memory roles = new string[](count);\n        uint256 idx = 0;\n        if (hasRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, account)) roles[idx++] = \"Admin\";\n        if (hasRole(FARMER_ROLE, account)) roles[idx++] = \"Farmer\";\n        if (hasRole(PROCESSOR_ROLE, account)) roles[idx++] = \"Processor\";\n        if (hasRole(ROASTER_ROLE, account)) roles[idx++] = \"Roaster\";\n        if (hasRole(DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE, account)) roles[idx++] = \"Distributor\";\n        return roles;\n    }\n\n    function uri(uint256 _batchId) public view override returns (string memory) {\n        require(_batchId >= 1 && _batchId < _batchIdCounter, \"This coffee batch does not exist!\");\n        return string(abi.encodePacked(\"ipfs://\", batches[_batchId].metadataCID));\n    }\n\n    function supportsInterface(bytes4 interfaceId) public view override(ERC1155, AccessControl) returns (bool) {\n AccessControlBadConfirmation().details: The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}.

ERC1155InsufficientBalance(address,uint2.details: Indicates an error related to the current `balance` of a `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.balance: Current balance for the interacting account.
params.needed: Minimum amount required to perform a transfer.
params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC1155InvalidApprover(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.

ERC1155InvalidArrayLength(uint256,uint25.details: Indicates an array length mismatch between ids and values in a safeBatchTransferFrom operation. Used in batch transfers.

params.idsLength: Length of the array of token identifiers
params.valuesLength: Length of the array of token amounts

ERC1155InvalidOperator(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC1155InvalidReceiver(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.

params.receiver: Address to which tokens are being transferred.

ERC1155InvalidSender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.

params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

ERC1155MissingApprovalForAll(address,add.details: Indicates a failure with the `operator`’s approval. Used in transfers.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.
params.owner: Address of the current owner of a token.

ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool).details: Emitted when `account` grants or revokes permission to `operator` to transfer their tokens, according to `approved`.

RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32.details: Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted signaling this.

RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call, an admin role bearer except when using {AccessControl-_setupRole}.

RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)

TransferBatch(address,address,address,ui.details: Equivalent to multiple {TransferSingle} events, where `operator`, `from` and `to` are the same for all transfers.

TransferSingle(address,address,address,u.details: Emitted when `value` amount of tokens of type `id` are transferred from `from` to `to` by `operator`.

URI(string,uint256).details: Emitted when the URI for token type `id` changes to `value`, if it is a non-programmatic URI. If an {URI} event was emitted for `id`, the standard https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1155#metadata-extensions[guarantees] that `value` will equal the value returned by {IERC1155MetadataURI-uri}.

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.
